title: Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur

overview.short: Gupteshwar Mahadev is a popular temple of the lord Shiva in the Udaipur city in the state of Rajasthan, India.

topPlaces.name: Sanchareswar Mahadev Temple
topPlaces.description: Sanchareswar Mahadev Temple is a temple of the lord Shiva in the Udaipur city in the state of Rajasthan, India.

topPlaces.name: Phanda, Udaipur
topPlaces.description: Phanda is a village in Udaipur district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. It is located 10 km towards South from District headquarters Udaipur.

topPlaces.name: Biliya
topPlaces.description: Biliya is a village in Udaipur district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. The district headquarters of the village is Udaipur.

topPlaces.name: Maharana Bhupal Stadium
topPlaces.description: Maharana Bhupal Stadium is a multipurpose stadium in Udaipur, Rajasthan. The ground is mainly used for organizing matches of football, cricket and other sports.

topPlaces.name: Ahar, Rajasthan
topPlaces.description: Ahar is a former town of historical significance, located on the north bank of the Ahar River in the present-day city of Udaipur, Rajasthan, in India.

topPlaces.name: Bohra Ganesh Temple
topPlaces.description: Bohra Ganesh Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Ganesh. It is situated near Mohanlal Sukhadia University in Udaipur.

topPlaces.name: Ahar Cenotaphs
topPlaces.description: The Ahar Cenotaphs are a group of cenotaphs located in Ahar, Udaipur, Rajasthan, India. The site contains more than 250 elevated dome-shaped pavilions, or chhatris, of the royal house of Mewar, which were built over approximately 350 years.

topPlaces.name: Udaipur City Bus Depot
topPlaces.description: Udaipur City Bus Depot is a Rajasthan Roadways Bus Depot in Udaipur, Rajasthan, India. It is the central bus stand for the Rajasthan State Road Transport Corporation, and have lines running for majority of other destinations in Rajasthan and further north and west towards Madhya Pradesh and Gujarat.

items.note: Sanchareswar Mahadev Temple is a temple of the lord Shiva in the Udaipur city in the state of Rajasthan, India.
Phanda is a village in Udaipur district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. It is located 10 km towards South from District headquarters Udaipur.
Biliya is a village in Udaipur district in the Indian state of Rajasthan. The district headquarters of the village is Udaipur.
Maharana Bhupal Stadium is a multipurpose stadium in Udaipur, Rajasthan. The ground is mainly used for organizing matches of football, cricket and other sports.
Ahar is a former town of historical significance, located on the north bank of the Ahar River in the present-day city of Udaipur, Rajasthan, in India.
Bohra Ganesh Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Ganesh. It is situated near Mohanlal Sukhadia University in Udaipur.

The Ahar Cenotaphs are a group of cenotaphs located in Ahar, Udaipur, Rajasthan, India. The site contains more than 250 elevated dome-shaped pavilions, or chhatris, of the royal house of Mewar, which were built over approximately 350 years.

Udaipur City Bus Depot is a Rajasthan Roadways Bus Depot in Udaipur, Rajasthan, India. It is the central bus stand for the Rajasthan State Road Transport Corporation, and have lines running for majority of other destinations in Rajasthan and further north and west towards Madhya Pradesh and Gujarat.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (7 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur?
faq.a: Stays in Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gupteshwar Mahadev, Udaipur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sanchareswar Mahadev Temple, Phanda, Udaipur, Biliya, Maharana Bhupal Stadium, Ahar, Rajasthan.
